== Notes for [[Item:Q106070|Q106070]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saffiyah_bint_%E2%80%98Abd_al-Muttalib

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harith_ibn_Harb
--------------------
* '''Jewish Wife'''

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2740828 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000003276264044

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003276264044

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
